resident_doc_policy.stage_switch_rule: Keep only resident docs across stage switches; drop prior stage docs and temporary focus.

tool_contracts.Cli_Toolbox.runtime-contract: Emit the staged runtime contract for the skill facade.
tool_contracts.Cli_Toolbox.stage-checklist: Emit stage objective, required outputs, resident docs, stage docs, entry actions, exit gates, and discard policy.
tool_contracts.Cli_Toolbox.stage-doc-contract: Emit the current stage document boundary.
tool_contracts.Cli_Toolbox.stage-command-contract: Emit entry commands, gate commands, stage actions, and forbidden actions.
tool_contracts.Cli_Toolbox.stage-graph-contract: Emit graph-reading and graph-update policy for the current stage.
tool_contracts.Cli_Toolbox.build-anchor-graph: Emit the current markdown graph workspace for the skill.
tool_contracts.Cli_Toolbox.rebuild-self-graph: Rebuild self_anchor_graph.json for the current skill root.

governance_rules: The skill doubles as a frontend standards system and a showroom redevelopment-doc system.
Runtime rules must be consumed from machine-readable contracts instead of markdown.
The graph display remains a first-class narrative surface across desktop and mobile variants.
Reusable component, motion, architecture, and runtime rules must stay document-first before code changes.
No contract may claim that ui-dev is runnable while the legacy UI code has been removed.
